title: Project Miner Approval Persistence Readiness Gates
objective: Surface the current approval-persistence runway and blockers inside the local Project Miner intake workbench while preserving the no-write boundary for schema, approval persistence, import mutation, hosted proof, and production state.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / Local Intake Workbench Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a local Approval Persistence Readiness panel to /pm-review/import-intake.
Show local preview context and review-checklist evidence as readiness gates that can become ready.
Show hosted parity closeout, schema authority, approval persistence authority, and import mutation authority as blocked gates.
Include the readiness gate summary in the browser-generated Markdown PM brief.
Extend the focused import-intake smoke to prove the panel, localStorage state, brief content, exact read seams, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.

readiness_gates.status_rule: ready only when a packet is loaded and the local decision draft is complete
ready only when the candidate-scoped browser-local checklist has at least one checked item
blocked until PM Lane 041A/041B close or classify hosted parity
blocked because PM Lane 049 is design-only and no SQL execution is admitted
blocked until a later packet admits the dedicated table and adapter implementation
blocked until approval persistence is green and a separate import packet is admitted

allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for boundary review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok after quoted PowerShell invocation.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
